title: The 12-hour format should be used with the AM/PM marker, otherwise the 24-hour format should be used
description: Enforces the use of the 12-hour format with the AM/PM marker instead of the 24-hour format.
message: The 12-hour format with AM/PM marker should be used.
recommendation: Use the 12-hour format with the AM/PM marker.

noncompliant.description: Prints the current date and time in 24-hour format.

compliant.description: Prints the current date and time in 12-hour format with AM/PM marker.

why_is_this_an_issue: Using the 24-hour format without the AM/PM marker can lead to confusion and misinterpretation.
how_to_fix: Use the datetime.strftime method to format the date and time as 12-hour with the AM/PM marker.

metadata.title: The 12-hour format should be used with the AM/PM marker, otherwise the 24-hour format should be used
